---
title: "Data Science"
author: Apurva Nakade
date: 2026-07-17
listing:
  contents: "/*/*/index.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  categories: true
---

<!--
Copyright (c) 2026 Apurva Nakade. All rights reserved.
Released under Apache 2.0 license as described in the file LICENSE.
Authors: Apurva Nakade
-->

Data science methods learn patterns from noisy, finite samples rather than solving a fixed equation exactly. Each topic below pairs a short introduction with interactive apps so you can see how a method's behavior changes as the data or model complexity changes.
